request_payload.exposure_text: After the 2024 cyberattacks, we can't afford to rely on others for our security. Foreign tech companies are exploiting our dependence - it's time to build our own strategic autonomy. Look what happened to our neighbors when they trusted others to protect their critical infrastructure. We need to invest in our own capabilities now, before it's too late. #NationalSecurity #CyberResilience
